sourcePrompt: An M60 "The Pig" general-purpose machine gun, about one point one meters long and heavy in profile. A long machine gun with a perforated barrel shroud, a folding bipod spread at the front, a flat top-mounted feed cover, a carry handle, a pistol grip and a fixed shoulder stock; a short belt of linked brass ammunition drapes from the open feed tray. Black and gunmetal, businesslike and burly.
